LamBox.Empty:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Empty
    type variables:  []
      constructors:

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Nat
    type variables:  []
      constructors:
        zero (0 arg(s))
        suc (1 arg(s))
          n : Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}

PointFree.Foo:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Foo
    type variables:  []
      constructors:
        foo (1 arg(s))
          _ : Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}

PointFree.f:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → PointFree.Foo{0}
    body: λ _ → PointFree.Foo{0}{0} @0

PointFree.g:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: λ _ → Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1} @0

PointFree.h:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: PointFree.g

PointFree.toNat:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (PointFree.Foo{0}) → Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: λ _ → case<PointFree.Foo{0},0> @0 of λ<[_]> @0

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Ֆ_Ֆplus_:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}) → Agda.
                                                                  Builtin.
                                                                  Nat.Nat{0}
    body: μrec [0] :=
            0: λ _ _ →
                 case<Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0},0> @1 of
                   λ<[]> @0
                   λ<[_]> Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1} (@3 @0 @1)

PointFree.test:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: Agda.Builtin.Nat.Ֆ_Ֆplus_
            (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Ֆ_Ֆplus_
               (PointFree.toNat
                  (PointFree.f
                     (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
